name: t2m
description: This is my own variant of the popular text2mindmap, cloned from http://github.com/tobloef/text2mindmap, with a lot of changes: - Syntax highlighting - instead of editing plain text, you can edit proper lists! - A simple sqlite-based php server for keeping mindmaps on the server - Read-only mode - you can see somebody else editing the mindmap and get live updates.  Just share the read-only link and get going!
